title: Capability Manifest Contract
description: Defines the contract for a Runtime capability: input/output schemas, verification block, projection metadata, and golden examples for contract-grade verification.

description.description: Bounded description of what the capability exposes.

domain.description: Must be 'runtime' for all Runtime capabilities.

verification.description: Verification status from the trust gate.

inputSchema.description: Relative path to a JSON Schema file defining valid inputs (e.g. shared/schemas/my-cap-input.schema.json).

outputSchema.description: Relative path to a JSON Schema file defining valid outputs (e.g. shared/schemas/my-cap-output.schema.json).

command.description: Shell command to execute for verification.

fixtures.description: Optional fixture file paths needed by the verification command.

type.description: Assertion type: regex matches output text, jsonpath extracts JSON values, schema validates against a JSON Schema.

value.description: The assertion pattern, JSONPath expression, or path to a JSON Schema file.

verify.description: Verification block defining how to verify this capability at runtime.

examples.description: Golden examples for contract-grade verification. Each example defines an input, the expected output, and how to validate the match.

name.description: Short descriptive name for this example (e.g. 'search-for-react').

input.description: Input payload matching the capability's inputSchema. Passed as-is to the executor.

expectedOutput.description: Expected output to validate against. For exact match, this is the full expected result. For invariantField match, only the listed fields are checked.

match.description: Validation mode: 'exact' checks deep equality; { invariantFields: [...] } checks only the listed top-level fields.

invariantFields.description: Top-level fields that must match the expected output exactly. Other fields may vary.

contract.description: Contract completeness: 'complete' = has input+output schemas + examples + verify; 'partial' = has some but not all; 'missing' = no contract fields. Set by the registry parser, not in the manifest file itself.

whenToUse.description: Jarvis capability kernel: description of when Hermes should invoke this capability. Used in recall ranking and tool selection. Required for projection-ready capabilities.

failureModes.description: Jarvis capability kernel: known failure modes. Helps Hermes decide when NOT to use this capability.

projection.description: Jarvis capability kernel: Hermes projection metadata. If present and valid, the capability is eligible for projection as a Hermes power.

inputContract.description: Optional input schema reference for the projection.

outputContract.description: Optional output schema reference for the projection.

costNotes.description: Jarvis capability kernel: optional notes about cost, rate limits, or resource usage for this capability.

verificationEvidence.description: Jarvis capability kernel: path or reference to execution evidence artifact for this capability. Required for verified projection-ready entry.
